---
nocite: |
  @abdurahman_perils_2024, @barrie_replication_2024
---

# Generative Language Models II {#sec-week7}

::: {.callout-note}
## Week 7
**Lecture:** Advanced prompting\
**Lab:** Introduction to `langchain`
:::

## Lecture

*Content to be added.*

## Lab

*Content to be added.*

## Readings

- @abdurahman_perils_2024
- @barrie_replication_2024
